message:
Redesign graph view with ego-centric neighborhood display

The previous graph view tried to render all 127 nodes as boxes with
connecting lines, which was unreadable and didn't scale. This commit
completely redesigns the graph visualization:

New approach:
- Left panel: Scrollable list of all nodes sorted by impact score
- Right panel: Ego-centric view showing selected node + neighborhood
  - Up to 8 blockers (issues this depends on)
  - Up to 8 dependents (issues waiting on this)
  - Impact metrics (PageRank, CriticalPath, Betweenness)

Also fixes:
- Time-travel mode (t key) now shows proper error messages when it
  fails instead of silently doing nothing
- Status message system added to footer for user feedback
- Fixed field access for insights.Stats.* metrics
